note: Provider-neutral workflow contracts. Configure credentials in n8n Cloud, never in this file.

workflows.name: Lead capture
nodes: Validate email, siteId, source, consent=yes, and allowed browser Origin
Rate-limit or challenge abusive sources at the edge
Upsert leads by site_id + email in Supabase/Baserow
Return a generic 200 response without revealing whether the email existed
workflows.failure: Send execution alert; do not log unnecessary personal data

workflows.name: Verified payment and PDF delivery
nodes: Capture the raw body and verify Razorpay/Cashfree webhook signature with a stored credential
Reject unverified events and non-success payment states
Map provider payment-link/reference to a server-maintained product and expected amount
Insert order using provider_payment_id as an idempotency key
Render the product deliveryEmailTemplate with customer name, payment ID, and private PDF URL
Mark delivered_at; optionally send a server-side GA4 purchase event
Return 200 so the provider stops retrying
workflows.failure: Alert support and leave delivered_at null so a retry can safely resume

workflows.name: Weekly Search Console opportunity review
nodes: For each approved live site, query Search Console page+query rows for the trailing 28 days and prior 28 days
Flag high-impression queries at positions 4-20 with weak CTR, material declines, and emerging queries without a matching page
Create experiment_suggestions with metrics and reason
Email a concise review queue to the editor
workflows.guardrail: Never change content, deploy, buy a domain, or alter prices automatically
